title: Reply and Forward
drDigitalIntro: Reply sends a message back to the person who emailed you. Your reply includes the original email in quotes so they remember what they asked. Forward sends someone else's email to another person — useful when you want to share information. Reply includes only the sender; Reply All sends to everyone who was on the original email chain.
drDigitalSuccess: You can participate in email conversations!
drDigitalHint: Use Reply All carefully — only use it when everyone needs to see your message.
